'''zomafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yukky|yukky]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yukky|yukky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zomafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zomafithi|zomafithi]] || [[word:zomafiji|zomafiji]] || [[word:zomafishi|zomafishi]] || [[word:zomafiki|zomafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zomafuthuthu|zomafuthuthu]] || [[word:zomafujuju|zomafujuju]] || [[word:zomafushushu|zomafushushu]] || [[word:zomafukuku|zomafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zomafuthu|zomafuthu]] || [[word:zomafuju|zomafuju]] || [[word:zomafushu|zomafushu]] || [[word:zomafuku|zomafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zomafufthuf|zomafufthuf]] || [[word:zomafufjuf|zomafufjuf]] || [[word:zomafufshuf|zomafufshuf]] || [[word:zomafufkuf|zomafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zomafethe|zomafethe]] || [[word:zomafeje|zomafeje]] || [[word:zomafeshe|zomafeshe]] || [[word:zomafeke|zomafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zomafothotho|zomafothotho]] || [[word:zomafojojo|zomafojojo]] || [[word:zomafoshosho|zomafoshosho]] || [[word:zomafokoko|zomafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zomafotho|zomafotho]] || [[word:zomafojo|zomafojo]] || [[word:zomafosho|zomafosho]] || [[word:zomafoko|zomafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zomafofthof|zomafofthof]] || [[word:zomafofjof|zomafofjof]] || [[word:zomafofshof|zomafofshof]] || [[word:zomafofkof|zomafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfthÃŸf|zomafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfjÃŸf|zomafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfshÃŸf|zomafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfkÃŸf|zomafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zomafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zomafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zomafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zomafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfthÃŸf|zomafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfjÃŸf|zomafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfshÃŸf|zomafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfkÃŸf|zomafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfthÃŸf|zomafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfjÃŸf|zomafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfshÃŸf|zomafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zomafÃŸfkÃŸf|zomafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zomafÃḊthÃḊ|zomafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zomafÃḊjÃḊ|zomafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zomafÃḊshÃḊ|zomafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zomafÃḊkÃḊ|zomafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zomafathatha|zomafathatha]] || [[word:zomafajaja|zomafajaja]] || [[word:zomafashasha|zomafashasha]] || [[word:zomafakaka|zomafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zomafatha|zomafatha]] || [[word:zomafaja|zomafaja]] || [[word:zomafasha|zomafasha]] || [[word:zomafaka|zomafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zomafafthaf|zomafafthaf]] || [[word:zomafafjaf|zomafafjaf]] || [[word:zomafafshaf|zomafafshaf]] || [[word:zomafafkaf|zomafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zomafasha|zomafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zomafshÃḋsha|zomafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zomafrosha|zomafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zomafmusha|zomafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zomafyasha|zomafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozomafnkshÃḋsha|gozomafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozomafnkrosha|gozomafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozomafnkmusha|gozomafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozomafnkyasha|gozomafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zomamafasha|zomamafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zomamafshÃḋsha|zomamafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zomamafrosha|zomamafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zomamafmusha|zomamafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zomamafyasha|zomamafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozomamafnkshÃḋsha|gozomamafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozomamafnkrosha|gozomamafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozomamafnkmusha|gozomamafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozomamafnkyasha|gozomamafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zemÃḊfasha|zemÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zemÃḊfshÃḋsha|zemÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zemÃḊfrosha|zemÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zemÃḊfmusha|zemÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zemÃḊfyasha|zemÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozemÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gozemÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozemÃḊfnkrosha|gozemÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozemÃḊfnkmusha|gozemÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozemÃḊfnkyasha|gozemÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zomfafasha|zomfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zomfafshÃḋsha|zomfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zomfafrosha|zomfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zomfafmusha|zomfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zomfafyasha|zomfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozomfafnkshÃḋsha|gozomfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozomfafnkrosha|gozomfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozomfafnkmusha|gozomfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozomfafnkyasha|gozomfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
